case_title: ROSELLA BLANDING VS. DANIEL ALVAREZ et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-16-2012. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-29-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. FEB-10-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF APR-27-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, DANIEL ALVAREZ, BETH ALVAREZ, FRED
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR SAMUEL EDWARD MEREDITH.
ARBITRATOR KENNETH GEORGE JOHNSON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-27-2012 THROUGH JUL-26-2012.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANDING, ROSELLA AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, DANIEL ALVAREZ, BETH ALVAREZ, FRED DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-10-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-14-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-26-2012
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE APR-26-2012.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-29-2012 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MARK B ABELSON.
